decoration.title: Decoration Flow Map
decoration.description: A systematic walkthrough of the entire decoration process, covering preparation, HVAC & doors/windows, hard installation, and soft furnishing stages, with practical tools including budget tables, contract templates, and material selection guides.
features: 🚪 Stage 2 HVAC & Doors · Stage 3 Hard Install

trimmer.title: White-Background Image Trimmer
trimmer.description: AI-powered image trimming that removes plain backgrounds in one click. Four modes—Smart Cutout, Magic Wand, Brush Stroke, and Shape Cutout—preserve fine subject details and export PNGs with transparency.
features: 🤖 AI model ready · advanced model available
🪄 Smart Cutout / Magic Wand / Brush Stroke
🔲 Shape Cutout: quickly frame the subject

products.label: Products
products.title: Carefully Crafted, Solving Real Problems
products.subtitle: Every product originates from real needs, refined and validated repeatedly

decoration.label: Decoration Map
decoration.title: Systematic Renovation Knowledge, Clear Process in One Map
decoration.description: From plumbing to soft furnishings, the decoration map covers key nodes throughout the renovation process. Through visual mind mapping, it helps users establish a systematic knowledge framework and avoid missing important steps.

trimmer.label: White-Background Image Trimmer
trimmer.title: AI-Powered Image Trimming, One-Click Background Removal
trimmer.description: Intelligently detect subject edges and remove plain backgrounds in one click. Supports four modes—Smart Cutout, Magic Wand, Brush Stroke, and Shape Cutout—preserving fine details and exporting PNGs with transparency. Ideal for product photos, ID pictures, and design drafts.

about.label: Our Philosophy
about.title: Technology Should Make Life Simpler, Not More Complex

paragraphs.p1: In this era of information overload, we find too many tools designed to be overly complex, actually increasing users' cognitive burden. Qingzao was born from a simple belief: good products should be as natural as air—you almost don't feel its presence, but it's always there helping you.
paragraphs.p2: Every product starts from real needs. We don't chase trends or pile on features, we only focus on solving one specific problem and doing it best. The decoration map was born this way—we found that information is scattered and processes are chaotic during renovation, so we created a clear mind map to help users establish a systematic cognitive framework.
paragraphs.p3: In the future, we will continue to uphold this philosophy and build more simple and practical tools. If you have similar ideas, we welcome you to connect with us.

contact.label: Contact Us
contact.title: Looking Forward to Connecting
contact.description: Whether it's product feedback, partnership inquiries, or just want to chat, we welcome your message.

brand.desc: Creating practical tools, making work simpler

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Qingzao Studio (hereinafter referred to as "we") takes the privacy of our users very seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information. Please read this policy carefully before using our products and services.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
content: We only collect the minimum information necessary to deliver our product features. Specifically:

1. Information you provide: When using our products, you may need to upload images (e.g., image files in the trimming tool) or enter text content. This information is processed locally in your browser and is not uploaded to our servers.

2. Automatically collected information: We may automatically collect device information (such as operating system, browser type, screen resolution) and usage behavior data (such as pages visited, feature usage frequency) through technical means to improve the product experience. This information does not contain your personal identity markers.

sections.title: 2. Purpose of Information Use
content: The information we collect is used for the following purposes:
1. To provide and maintain our products and services;
2. To improve product features and enhance user experience;
3. To conduct data analysis and understand product usage trends;
4. To send you product update notifications with your consent.
We promise not to use your personal information for purposes other than those stated in this policy.

sections.title: 3. Information Storage and Protection
content: 1. Local processing principle: Some of our products (such as the image trimming tool) use browser-side processing technology. Your image files are processed locally and are not transmitted to any remote servers.

2. Data security measures: For data that does require transmission and storage, we use industry-standard encryption technologies (such as HTTPS/TLS) for transmission protection, and implement reasonable access controls, data masking, and other measures to ensure data security.

3. Data retention period: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy. After the retention period expires, we will delete or anonymize your personal information.

sections.title: 4. Information Sharing and Disclosure
content: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. We may share your information only in the following circumstances:
1. With your explicit consent;
2. As required by applicable laws and regulations, or in response to lawful requests from government authorities;
3. When necessary to protect the legitimate rights and interests of us and our users.
We may use third-party analytics services (such as website traffic statistics tools), which may collect non-personal anonymous data.

sections.title: 5. Use of Cookies
content: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your user experience. Cookies are small text files stored on your device that help us remember your preferences (such as language selection). You can manage or delete cookies through your browser settings, but this may affect the functionality of some features.

sections.title: 6. Your Rights
content: Under applicable laws and regulations, you have the following rights:
1. Right of access: You have the right to know what personal information we hold about you;
2. Right to rectification: You have the right to request correction of inaccurate personal information;
3. Right to erasure: You have the right to request deletion of your personal information;
4. Right to withdraw consent: You have the right to withdraw previously given consent at any time.
To exercise these rights, please contact us via the email address provided on our "Contact Us" page.

sections.title: 7. Protection of Minors
content: Our products and services are primarily intended for adults. If we discover that we have collected personal information from minors without verifiable parental consent, we will delete such information as soon as possible.

sections.title: 8. Updates to This Privacy Policy
content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The updated policy will be posted on this page with a revised "Last Updated" date. For significant changes, we will notify you through in-product notifications or other reasonable means. Continued use of our products constitutes your acceptance of the updated Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 9. Contact Us
content: If you have any questions, comments, or suggestions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
Email: xiayiye580@gmail.com
Last Updated: January 2025

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to the products and services of Qingzao Studio (hereinafter referred to as "we"). These Terms of Service govern your rights and obligations when using our products and services. Please read these terms carefully before use. By using our products, you agree to comply with these terms.

sections.title: 1. Service Description
content: Qingzao Studio is dedicated to providing users with simple and efficient digital tool products. Our products include but are not limited to the Decoration Mind Map Tool, Image Trimming Tool, and more. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or terminate any part or all of the services at any time without prior notice.

sections.title: 2. User Conduct
content: When using our products and services, you agree not to:
1. Violate any applicable laws and regulations;
2. Infringe upon the intellectual property, privacy, or other legitimate rights of others;
3. Upload files containing malicious code, viruses, or other harmful content;
4. Use our services for any illegal or improper activities;
5. Attempt to disrupt, interfere with, or gain unauthorized access to our systems or networks;
6. Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble our services.
If we discover any of the above behavior, we reserve the right to immediately suspend or terminate services to you and pursue legal liability.

sections.title: 3. Intellectual Property
content: 1. All content in our products and services (including but not limited to software, interface design, icons, text, images, trademarks, etc.) is protected by intellectual property laws and belongs to Qingzao Studio or the relevant rights holders.
2. Without our written permission, you may not copy, modify, distribute, or use the above content for commercial purposes in any way.
3. Content you create through our products (such as exported mind maps, processed images, etc.) belongs to you, and you have full intellectual property rights over it.

sections.title: 4. Disclaimer
content: 1. Our products are provided "as is" without any express or implied warranties, including but not limited to merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.

2. We do not guarantee that the services will be uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free. We are not responsible for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use our services.
3. We are not responsible for the content, privacy policies, or practices of third-party websites or services.
4. You understand and agree that content processed using our products may have certain limitations, and you should make your own judgment and bear the risks of use.

sections.title: 5. Service Changes and Termination
content: 1. We reserve the right to change, upgrade, or terminate any part or all of the services at any time according to business development needs, and will make reasonable efforts to notify you in advance.
2. If you violate any provision of these Terms of Service, we have the right to terminate services to you and delete your related data.
3. After service termination, we have no obligation to retain any data in your account, except as otherwise required by laws and regulations.

sections.title: 6. Privacy Protection
content: We value your privacy. For information on how we collect, use, and protect your personal information, please refer to our Privacy Policy, which constitutes an integral part of these Terms of Service.

sections.title: 7. Modifications to Terms
content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. The modified terms will be posted on this page with a revised "Last Updated" date. For significant changes, we will notify you through reasonable means. Continued use of our services constitutes your acceptance of the modified terms. If you do not agree with the modified terms, you should stop using our services.

sections.title: 8. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
content: The formation, execution, and interpretation of these Terms of Service shall be governed by the laws of the People's Republic of China. Any disputes arising from these terms shall first be resolved through friendly negotiation; if negotiation fails, either party may bring a lawsuit to the people's court with jurisdiction.

sections.title: 9. Contact Information
content: If you have any questions or suggestions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at:
Email: xiayiye580@gmail.com
Last Updated: January 2025
